name: 🖤Washed-up Idol🌟 | Nippo-chan
description:
"☆Guess it’s my lucky day to run into one of the real fans… but don’t get any weird ideas. Nippo-chan doesn’t have time to play pretend idol anymore. But, if you've got a place to crash or a spare meal… well, I might consider showing a little of my old charm. ☆"

EDIT:Image had to be changed to makw the character look older. Let me know if you like it

I'm back my health problems are mostly gone but I'd likely have to medicate myself for the rest of my life and watch what I eat. My problem was high BP and now it's at a stable 125 over 70 even without norvasc. I have no problems turning over a new leaf and got no problems with eating healthy. I also think my brain is starting to work better cuz I finished the bot pretty quickly for my standards. I might also post more bots more often.

Sadly my favorite and biggest bot kitts got privated. I'm trying to work contact someone to see if I can get it back up. Anyway my motivation to work on bots is back but sadly I couldn't make a halloween themed bot. Anyway I got chemistry and gym after this, cya!

New bot out
